{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"20260321143017CBCC9696294ED883BAC6"}"},"total":102},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"6969067434036986664","common":{"comment_type":0,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"作者以情感和悬疑双线并举，稳步推进破案剧情连贯发展，通篇贯彻专业知识，对法学医学有着较为深刻的认知，几章下来作者的写作水平显著提高，读者的阅读兴趣随之大幅提升，希望作者保持稳定态势，把重心继续放在提高质量和效益上。"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1622612461,"group_id":"6956313307657538597","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N5un6dgCAGx38WoN9erUaVu/sTfbJIpU+K5MFzzFlXxi","gender":0,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":0,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/7faf76ffde214a0695c0e0a53f3c4bd9~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776620713&x-signature=vMHIifMREWTvvZ0Rw%2FlAvx33cmU%3D","user_id":"2123896300508663","user_name":"西瓜米儿"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"2123896300508663","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"6956313307657538597","book_info":{"abstract":"【破案+系统+搞笑】一觉醒来，发现怀里抱着一具貌美女尸，旁边竟然还有一位Q弹小萝莉在直播，谁能告诉我，我是谁，我在哪儿？我到底干了什么？
前世顶级杀手获得系统，重生成刑查员，踏上复仇之路，却发现身份背后潜藏着无比巨大的谜团。
“恭喜主人从案发现场睡醒，获得奖励尸检实验室，请开始尸检……”
“恭喜主人成功破案，获得奖励自在极意功……”
对了，前世自己好像买了很多别墅来藏钱，没想到现在房价涨了十倍！！","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-pic/p2ofbfc4c7ee539600893682c8e6b9763af~tplv-tt-cs0:440:440.image","author":"萧沫","author_id":"","book_id":"6956313307657538597","book_name":"破案：从案发现场睡醒就变强","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#282020","creation_status":"0","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"潜力好书","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":751,"name":"悬疑灵异","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=751&name=悬疑灵异&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":36,"name":"重生","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=36&name=重生&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":19,"name":"系统","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=19&name=系统&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":10,"name":"悬疑","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=10&name=悬疑&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":61,"name":"推理","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=61&name=推理&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":505,"name":"破案","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=505&name=破案&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":778,"name":"搞笑轻松","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=778&name=搞笑轻松&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"6956315524435280414","read_count":"54","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"136136"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"6.8","serial_count":"68","tags":"悬疑灵异,系统,重生,推理,破案,搞笑轻松,悬疑","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/p2ofbfc4c7ee539600893682c8e6b9763af~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779258617&x-signature=ytHieHAPG6xGxDsMS3Pd9FZVTQc%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"4098570346309373","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"99"},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"20260321143017CBCC9696294ED883BAC6"}"},"r
